title: Robin Hood
description: Displays a predicted trajectory for projectiles.
body: # Robin Hood Displays a predicted trajectory for projectiles. ## Installation Make sure you have install fabric loader first. More information about installing Fabric Loader can be found [here](https://fabricmc.net/use/). To use Robin Hood, download it from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/robinhood), [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/sebastianrasor/robinhood/releases) or [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/robinhood). The downloaded jar file should be placed in your `mods` folder. ## Screenshots
